CustomField.description: This is the Forecast Owner who will update this value
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Region__c , 'EMEAI'), SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_EMEA__r.FirstName +' '+SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_EMEA__r.LastName , IF(ISPICKVAL( Region__c , 'APAC'), SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_APAC__r.FirstName +' '+SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_APAC__r.LastName , IF(ISPICKVAL( Region__c , 'AMERICAS'), SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_Americas__r.FirstName+' '+SIOP_Model__r.Region_Forecast_Owner_Americas__r.LastName , '') ) )
CustomField.label: Region Forecast Owner
